_comment: Single source of truth for the Deserto product-cutout LoRA pipeline. Container families train one LoRA each; flavors are prompt variations. Labels/logos are NEVER asked of the model — added by hand at the end. See ../../docs/product-lora-guide.md.
basePrompt: {trigger}, {flavor}, single product centered on a seamless pure-white background, studio product photography, soft even lighting, full product visible, sharp focus, high detail, photorealistic
negativePrompt: text, letters, words, brand logo, label, watermark, signature, sparkles, star glints, lens flare, glare artifacts, extra objects, duplicate product, hands, people, busy background, reflections, blurry, low quality, cropped
captionTemplates: {trigger} on a white background, front view, studio lighting
{trigger} on a light gray background, three-quarter angle
{trigger} on a white background, three-quarter view from the right
{trigger}, slight top-down view, soft even lighting
{trigger} on a seamless white sweep, front view, product photo

items.flavor: deep blue-purple sparkling drink with fresh blueberries
bright green sparkling drink with kiwi slices
golden-orange sparkling drink with mango
pink-red sparkling drink with raspberries
pale yellow sparkling drink with pineapple
red sparkling drink with a fresh strawberry
warm amber sparkling drink with peach slices
latte with smooth microfoam, light tan surface
espresso with a small dollop of foam
spiced chai latte, warm amber with foam
black americano, dark surface
cappuccino with a tall domed foam cap
small demitasse of espresso with crema
iced spiced chai, amber through ice cubes
iced espresso layered over milk and ice
iced latte, light coffee color over ice
iced black americano over ice cubes
layers of sponge cake, cream and chocolate, red accents
layers of cookies-and-cream crumble and white cream

cookie.caption: a thick round dsrtcookie NYC-style cookie

items.flavor: pale golden cookie with white chocolate chunks and macadamia
deep red velvet cookie with white chocolate chips
golden brown cookie with chocolate chips and walnuts
